metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for multi-perspective analysis, code review, output styling, and session coordination

plugins.name: panel-system
plugins.description: Dynamic multi-perspective analysis with persistence (v5.0.0). Supports --resume for interrupted panels, --list/--show for discovery, --format (github/json/markdown), --context. Per-phase state files in Work/panels/.

plugins.name: code
plugins.description: Development workflows: orchestration patterns, code review, TDD, and specialized agents (v1.4.0). 15 agents including typescript-pro, python-pro, javascript-pro, tdd, debugger, code-reviewer, build-error-resolver, refactor-cleaner. Includes /code:review command, quality gates, and language-specific patterns.

plugins.name: write
plugins.description: Creative writing workflows (v1.4.0): prose craft, worldbuilding, perplexity detection, and novel state management. 13 agents including novel-character-reviewer, novel-continuity-reviewer, novel-state-updater, novel-style-linter. perplexity-gate and novel-state skills.

plugins.name: output-styles
plugins.description: Switchable output styles for Claude Code responses. Includes 8 styles (ultra-concise, bullet-points, genui, html-structured, markdown-focused, table-based, tts-summary, yaml-structured) with /style command.

plugins.name: asha
plugins.description: Cognitive scaffold with automatic learning (v1.18.0). Cross-project identity (~/.asha/), confidence-tracked learnings, session synthesis, pattern extraction, secret scrubbing, and keeper calibration. Identity and learnings persist across all Asha-enabled projects.

plugins.name: image
plugins.description: Image generation workflows: Stable Diffusion prompt engineering, ComfyUI workflow design, parameter optimization, and LoRA/model selection for AI art generation.

plugins.name: scheduler
plugins.description: Scheduled task execution for Claude Code. Manage cron-style recurring tasks with natural language time expressions. Supports cron and systemd backends with rate limiting, audit logging, and security constraints.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: DevOps patterns and infrastructure skills: Docker, database migrations, deployment, and operational best practices.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review patterns, OWASP guidelines, and defensive coding practices for web applications.
